summary: Iteration 42 - Ubuntoo Profile Sync feature testing. All 11 backend tests passed. All frontend features verified working: sync banner appears for logged-in users who haven't synced, clicking sync triggers API call with spinner, user is redirected to Profil tab after sync, Re-synchroniser button available for already-synced users, trust bar and badges display correctly, all 6 tabs work, Discussions posting still works.
test_credentials: bob22 / Solerys777! (role: particulier, has passport but NO CV/DCLIC)
seed_data_creation: Ubuntoo profile created for bob22 during sync testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Ubuntoo profile sync feature fully functional. GET /api/ubuntoo/profile?token=X returns synced:false for new users, synced:true with profile data after sync. POST /api/ubuntoo/sync-profile?token=X creates profile with AI-generated data (or defaults if no skills/DCLIC). Frontend shows sync banner on Accueil tab for logged-in users who haven't synced. After sync, redirects to Profil tab with trust bar, badges, softskills, and Re-synchroniser button.

backend_api.GET_profile_valid_token_before_sync: PASSED - Returns synced:false with has_dclic/has_cv flags
backend_api.POST_sync_valid_token: PASSED - Creates profile with status, trust, softskills, badges
backend_api.GET_profile_after_sync: PASSED - Returns synced:true with full profile data
backend_api.profile_has_synced_from: PASSED - Includes dclic_pro, cv_analysis, passport flags
backend_api.status_valid: PASSED - Status is one of expected values

frontend_ui.ubuntoo_page_loads: PASSED - /ubuntoo loads with new design (white bg, navy header)
frontend_ui.all_6_tabs_work: PASSED - Accueil, Profil, Groupes, Discussions, Mentorat, Impact
frontend_ui.sync_banner_not_visible_logged_out: PASSED - No banner when not logged in
frontend_ui.sync_banner_visible_logged_in_not_synced: PASSED - Banner shows 'Actualise ton espace sur Ubuntoo'
frontend_ui.sync_button_triggers_api: PASSED - Clicking sync button calls POST /api/ubuntoo/sync-profile
frontend_ui.redirect_to_profil_after_sync: PASSED - User redirected to Profil tab after sync
frontend_ui.profil_shows_real_data: PASSED - Shows pseudo, territory, status, trust bar
frontend_ui.resync_button_available: PASSED - 'Re-synchroniser' button on Profil tab for synced users
frontend_ui.trust_bar_displays: PASSED - Trust bar with percentage shown
frontend_ui.badges_display: PASSED - Status badges and progression badges shown
frontend_ui.discussions_posting_works: PASSED - Can post new exchange with AI detection
frontend_ui.discussions_load_from_api: PASSED - Exchanges load dynamically from API
frontend_ui.groups_display: PASSED - All 4 groups (reconversion, handicap, numerique, vsi) shown

mocked_api.note: AI sync uses real GPT-5.2 via Emergent LLM Key. bob22 has no CV/DCLIC so AI may not be invoked, resulting in default profile values.
